---
title: "Reports"
subtitle: "analysis writeups and project reports"
---

This section collects standalone analysis reports that I have written across statistics, data analysis, and applied coursework.

The reports in the sidebar open as full HTML pages and keep their original formatting. They cover topics including food habits, high school seniors, chi-squared testing, logistic regression, two-way ANOVA, a housing analysis, and weather patterns.

## Included reports

- Food at College
- High School Seniors Analysis
- Chi Squared Test
- Internship Logistic Regression
- Data Science or Computer Science?
- Stephanie's Housing Request
- Did Rexburg run out of snow?
